citations.document_title: LEP25.0001 - draft Planning Proposal - For submission
citations.claim: Wagga Wagga City Council is proposing to change a rule in the Wagga Wagga Local Environmental Plan 2010 that affects secondary dwellings across the entire local government area .

citations.document_title: LEP25.0001 - draft Planning Proposal - For submission
citations.claim: The main proposal is to increase the maximum allowed size for a secondary dwelling .
citations.fact_notes: No verifiable facts extracted from claim

citations.document_title: LEP25.0001 - draft Planning Proposal - For submission
citations.claim: Currently, a secondary dwelling can be up to 33% of the size of the main house on the property .
citations.fact_notes: No verifiable facts extracted from claim

citations.document_title: LEP25.0001 - draft Planning Proposal - For submission
citations.claim: The proposal would change this to allow secondary dwellings to be up to 65% of the size of the main house .
citations.fact_notes: No verifiable facts extracted from claim

citations.document_title: LEP25.0001 - draft Planning Proposal - For submission
citations.claim: This change would apply to secondary dwellings on all types of land where they are currently permitted, including rural zones and other residential areas .
citations.fact_notes: No verifiable facts extracted from claim

citations.document_title: LEP25.0001 - draft Planning Proposal - For submission
citations.claim: This change would apply to secondary dwellings on all types of land where they are currently permitted, including rural zones and other residential areas .

citations.claim: The aim is to offer more diverse housing choices by allowing larger and more practical secondary dwellings .
citations.fact_notes: No verifiable facts extracted from claim
